arts.ttl: RB Salzburg vs. Real Madrid: Preview, Predictions and Lineups
arts.sum: With the top spot in Group H on the line, RB Salzburg and Real Madrid are set to clash in the final group stage game of the FIFA Club World Cup. After a slow start under Xabi Alonso, Real Madrid are coming off a 3–1 victory over Pachuca .

arts.ttl: FC Salzburg vs Real Madrid: Official Squad Announced For Club World Cup Game
arts.sum: Real Madrid will face FC Salzburg in the final group stage game knowing a point will secure passage to the Round of 16. Real Madrid Squad vs RB Salzburg:

arts.ttl: FC Salzburg vs Real Madrid Preview: Start Time, Team News, How To Watch & Live Stream
arts.sum: Real Madrid face the Austrian side FC Salzburg in their final group game of the FIFA Club World Cup. Los Blancos know a draw will be enough to qualify for the knockout stages, but a win will mean they top the group. Real Madrid is coming off a fantastic 3-1 win over Pachuca, playing 83 minutes of the game with 10 men, with Raul Asencio sent off.

arts.ttl: Asencio ruled out, but will Mbappe return? Predicted Real Madrid lineup vs. Salzburg
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes an in-depth look at how Real Madrid could line up for Friday’s FIFA Club World Cup Group H clash with Red Bull Salzburg.
